note: Internal levels: 1=N5 (easiest) … 5=N1 (hardest), mirroring HSK convention so that level <= target_level gives cumulative vocabulary.

levels.label: N5
levels.description: Basic greetings, numbers, time, family, simple daily topics. Very short sentences, present/past tense only.

levels.label: N4
levels.description: Daily routines, shopping, travel, simple narratives. Te-form connections, plain-form quotation.

levels.label: N3
levels.description: Social topics, opinions, short narratives. Conditional, relative clauses, ながら, plain-form embedding.

levels.label: N2
levels.description: News, business, complex narratives. Passive, causative, literary vocabulary.

levels.label: N1
levels.description: Literary texts, classical elements, academic writing. Complex grammar, archaic vocabulary.
